overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character sitting at a neon-lit bar, inspecting items on the counter, then getting up and walking through the establishment toward a back stage area. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with cyan and red neon lighting, leather booths, and poster-covered corridors.

agents.ego_description: sitting at the bar counter observing the surroundings and other patrons

cyan neon sign shaped like a bullet or shell casing mounted on back wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with the player seated at a cyberpunk bar counter illuminated by cyan and pink neon lights. A patron in a purple tank top gets up and leaves while another patron in a distinctive gold jacket sits at the counter. The back bar features a large mirror with vertical lighting and liquor bottles.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar counter surface with interactive items and magazines

events.description: game UI appears for item inspection, highlighting objects on the bar counter
player character stands up from the bar stool

agents.ego_description: inspecting various items on the bar counter including magazines, ashtrays, and accessories

entered.detail: stack of magazines with visible cover art on the bar surface
glass ashtray with cigarette butts on the counter
dark glass bottle with pump dispenser
orange beaded bracelet lying on the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses downward on the bar counter surface where the player inspects various items including magazines, an ashtray, and accessories. Game UI elements appear indicating interactive objects. The player then stands up from the stool, transitioning from seated to standing.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar interior with curved booth seating and ambient neon

events.description: moving away from the bar counter into the main seating area with booths
passing from cyan-lit bar area to section with red neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar interior past curved leather booth seating toward the back exit

entered.detail: curved leather banquette seating with high backs and metallic trim
circular table with reflective surface and single chair
partial height wall dividing the bar sections
row of white metal lockers against the back wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks away from the bar counter through the interior seating area featuring curved leather booths and round tables. The lighting shifts from cyan to red neon tones as the camera approaches a back corridor with metal lockers and a doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with concert posters leading to stage area

events.description: entering corridor with hexagonal floor tiles and poster-covered walls
emerging into larger space with intense red stage lighting and fog effects

agents.ego_description: walking through doorway into corridor and approaching a stage area with red ambient lighting

entered.detail: large promotional posters for bands and events plastered on the corridor walls
floor covered in hexagonal tiles with warm lighting
elevated stage area with red neon tube lighting and performance equipment
glass door with metallic frame leading to the stage area

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a doorway into a narrow corridor with hexagonal floor tiles and walls covered in concert posters. The scene transitions into a larger stage area bathed in intense red neon light with a performance platform visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that moves from a neon-lit bar counter into the depths of a vibrant, red-hued backstage area. It begins seated at a counter illuminated by cyan and pink neon, where patrons move past a mirrored back bar filled with liquor bottles. As the camera tilts down to inspect magazines and an ashtray on the surface, the perspective shifts from seated to standing before gliding away from the bar. The scene then transitions through an interior seating area of curved leather booths, with the lighting shifting from cyan to deep red as the camera approaches a corridor of metal lockers. Finally, the movement carries through a doorway and across hexagonal floor tiles past walls covered in concert posters, opening into a large stage area bathed in intense red light.
